exploration_notes: The LLVM optimization pipeline lifecycle flows as follows: (1) **PassBuilder** (defined in `llvm/lib/Passes/PassBuilder.cpp`, line 507) is the entry point that constructs pipeline configurations and parses pass names. (2) **PassManager<IRUnitT>** (template class at `llvm/include/llvm/IR/PassManager.h`, line 162) is the core execution engine that iterates over registered passes and calls their `run()` methods.
